name: Turk Ilac Ve Serum Sanayi Anonim Sirketi
summary: Turk Ilac Ve Serum Sanayi Anonim Sirketi produces and sells human pharmaceuticals and vaccines in Turkey. It offers vaccines, basic IV solutions, premix solutions, hemodialysis solutions, sterile distilled water, diagnostic products, and immunostimulant products. The company was founded in 2010 and is based in Ankara, Turkey.
